question: Find 5 Indian B2B SaaS startups in HR tech and summarize their positioning.
answer: Here are 5 prominent Indian B2B SaaS HR tech startups: Darwinbox (enterprise HCM platform for large global organizations), Keka HR (employee-centric all-in-one HRMS for SMEs and mid-market), Zimyo (engagement-first HR platform for startups and SMEs), HROne (inbox-style HR automation for companies moving away from manual processes), and Kredily (freemium HR/payroll platform democratizing compliance for small businesses). Each occupies a distinct segment of the market — from enterprise to SME to startup — with differentiated UX and business model strategies.

key_findings.claim: Darwinbox (founded 2015, Hyderabad) is a mobile-first enterprise HRMS serving 1,000+ customers across 130+ countries and was named Gartner Peer Insights Customer's Choice 2025 for Cloud HCM Suites.
Keka HR (founded 2015–16, Hyderabad) is positioned as an employee-centric HRMS for SMEs and mid-market businesses, used by 10,000+ companies across India and global markets.
Zimyo (founded 2018, Delhi NCR) is an engagement-first HR SaaS with 40+ modules for SMEs, serving 2,000+ customers across 38 countries with $4.5M raised.
HROne uses a unique inbox-style UI where every HR task appears as an actionable message, giving it the fastest user adoption rate; it has helped 2,000+ brands automate HR.
Kredily is a freemium HR and payroll platform aimed at startups and small businesses, offering a free plan for unlimited employees, trusted by 1,000+ clients.
